title: memory.read.v1
description: Receipt payload recording a memory read/retrieval: which memories an agent retrieved for an action, and the query that produced them. Carried as the payload of a Treeship receipt artifact with kind=memory.read.v1.

zmem_receipt_id.description: Identifier of the ZMem (or other provider) retrieval receipt this read corresponds to.

trace_sha256.description: SHA-256 over the retrieval trace the producer committed to.

activegraph_event_id.description: Optional ActiveGraph event id this read corresponds to.

activegraph_run_id.description: Optional ActiveGraph run id this read belongs to.

query_hash.description: Hash of the query/prompt that drove the retrieval.

memories_returned.description: Number of memories returned by the retrieval.

scope.description: Tenant/workspace/session scope the retrieval ran in.
